migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS demo_note (id UUID PRIMARY KEY, message VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL); INSERT INTO demo_note (id, message) SELECT 'aaaaaaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaaaaaaaaaa', 'Installed from marketplace' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM demo_note);

reports.title: Install notes
reports.description: Rows from demo_note after marketplace install
reports.query: SELECT message FROM demo_note ORDER BY message
